inputs.price_source: FY2024 10-K: closing share price December 31, 2024 (PCH delisted January 30, 2026)
inputs.fcf_source: FY2024 Cash Available for Distribution $67.474M / 79.339M weighted-average diluted shares (10-K 2025-02-13)
inputs.book_per_share_caveat: Stockholders equity $2,037.7M / 78.7M shares; timber at depletion basis not fair-value NAV
inputs.acres_source: 10-K Item 1: 2.1 million acres of timberland in seven states
inputs.merger_consideration: 1.8185 Rayonier shares + $0.61 cash per PCH share (8-K 2026-01-30)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base uses filing CAD, not dividend ($1.80/sh exceeded CAD in FY2024). Standalone archive at last trade price; ongoing exposure is RYN.

optionality_gate.floor_value_note: [Assumption] timber and timberlands at GAAP depletion basis ~$30/sh gross less ~$11/sh net debt; not fair-value acreage marks
optionality_gate.overlay_nav_note: [Assumption] rural land sale comps ~$2,302/acre FY2024 vs cost-basis timber book; undeveloped HBU acreage not fully marked
optionality_gate.notes: Merger closed 2026-01-30; stance gate uses pre-merger standalone economics for archive. Floor does not override sub-15% Lawrence IRR.

gaap_vs_fair_value.policy_source: 10-K: timber and timberlands carried at cost less depletion; no fair-value NAV disclosed

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Per-acre fair marks on 2.1M-acre portfolio vs FY2024 rural sales (~$2,302/acre average)
Rayonier merger synergy realization on combined ~4M acres
Mid-cycle normalized lumber and sawlog pricing for Wood Products segment
Carbon sequestration and non-timber royalty monetization beyond disclosed leases

segments_or_options.label: 2.1M-acre core timberland (Northern + Southern regions)
segments_or_options.nav_assumption: GAAP timber book ~$30/sh gross; depletion basis understates mature Southern timber
segments_or_options.evidence: 10-K Item 1; segment Timberlands Adjusted EBITDDA $151.3M FY2024

segments_or_options.label: Rural real estate / higher-and-better-use dispositions
segments_or_options.evidence: FY2024 sold 57,389 acres rural at ~$2,302/acre; lumpy Real Estate EBITDDA

segments_or_options.label: Seven sawmills + plywood (Wood Products segment)
segments_or_options.evidence: FY2024 segment operating loss $(23.6)M; Adjusted EBITDDA $20.5M at lumber trough

segments_or_options.label: Rayonier all-stock merger (closed 2026-01-30)
segments_or_options.nav_assumption: Realized consideration 1.8185 RYN + $0.61 cash; value follows RYN from close

segments.label: Timberlands
segments.owner_cash_note: Harvest cash flow; ~7.4M ton 2025 guide; 35-49% of Wood Products fiber internal

segments.label: Wood Products
segments.base_terminal_rationale: Cyclical mill segment at lumber trough; positive EBITDDA but GAAP operating loss; burden in consolidated CAD path, not zeroed
segments.source: 10-K Note 2; Wood Products segment statistics FY2024

segments.label: Real Estate
segments.owner_cash_note: Rural land sales + development lots; Real Estate Adjusted EBITDDA $147.0M FY2024 incl. large Southern timberland parcel sale
segments.source: 10-K MD&A Real Estate Adjusted EBITDDA table FY2024

segment_build.tie_out_note: Lawrence FCF path uses consolidated CAD per share, not segment EBITDDA sum

bear.notes: Prolonged lumber trough; Wood Products losses persist; dividend cut; CAD flat

base.notes: Normalized CAD $0.85/sh; modest harvest growth; lumber cycle normalizes from FY2024 trough

bull.notes: Lumber rebound + rural HBU sales; CAD $1.00+ mid-cycle; multiple re-rate

human_review.notes: PCH delisted post-merger; last standalone price $39.25 (12/31/2024). Merger proxy Morgan Stanley DCF ranges cited as [PENDING APPROVAL] context only.

growth_explanation.base_mechanism: Sustainable harvest on 2.1M acres, internal fiber to mills, periodic rural/HBU land sales, lumber cycle normalization from 2024 trough
growth_explanation.bear_risk: Wood Products operating losses; dividend exceeded CAD; ~$1.0B long-term debt; Q3 2025 YTD net income only ~$3.3M

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Timber at depletion cost; FY2024 rural sales ~$2,302/acre vs implied book ~$1,100/acre

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / acreage?
option_scan.evidence: 2.1M acres; rural real estate program; master-planned development and country club

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Wood Products operating loss $(23.6)M FY2024 at lumber trough

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF?
option_scan.evidence: Real estate development pipeline; lumpy rural parcel timing

option_scan.question: Embedded in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Timber harvest and mill sales in operating revenue

merger_event.consideration: 1.8185 RYN shares + $0.61 cash per PCH share

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

paths.label: Segment-derived growth (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

paths.label: NAV overlay dated payoff (7yr to overlay base)
paths.weight_why: Answers a different question (NAV convergence) than 7yr cash-flow IRR; capped weight to avoid theory conflation.
weight_falsifiers: NAV overlay base not updated when segment build or filings change >10%
floor_pass false but weight above 15% without [HUMAN REVIEW]

flags: NAV overlay is a different theory (asset payoff vs cash-flow IRR); weight capped at 10% to limit theory conflation.

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
